title: oxalis nivea
intro: Oxalis nivea, also known as snowdrop oxalis, is a flowering plant species in the wood sorrel family Oxalidaceae. It is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Mexico and Central America, characterized by its white flowers and heart-shaped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Oxalis nivea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and promoting immune system function.
